nodes.label: JWT Best Practices: Secret Rotation, Revocation Store (Redis), Short Lifetime
Use shopspring/decimal for all money to avoid float rounding errors
Single-table inheritance chosen over table-per-subclass (no subclass-distinct attributes today)
Statement Report Format (converted from Excel, Persian)
BPS (basis-points) for all rate fields to avoid float rounding
(dashboard) route group — parenthesised segments not in URL

main-logo.jpg — Baygan e Man brand logo (JPEG, high-res). Dark teal rounded-square background with gold calligraphic serif wordmark reading 'Baygan e Man'. A stylized feather/quill flourish sits atop the 'g'. Warm gold metallic texture on letterforms. Primary brand identity asset.

main-logo.png — Baygan e Man brand logo (PNG, smaller/icon variant). Identical design: dark teal rounded-square background with gold calligraphic 'Baygan e Man' wordmark and feather flourish. Used as app icon / favicon-scale asset.

hyperedges.label: JWT validation pipeline: ParseToken → ValidateClaims → RBAC middleware gate
Contract domain: Project + Contractor + Contract together form a payment contract
Financial precision stack: shopspring/decimal + BPS rates + NUMERIC(20,8) in Postgres
Approval Workflow Pattern (state machine + ApprovalEvent audit + role-gated transitions)
Financial Calculation Pipeline (Contract BPS rates → Recompute → InterimStatement fields → Excel report)
Frontend Data Layer (apiFetch + TanStack Query + Zustand auth)
